productDisplayName: Jockey Women White Racerback Tank Top
description: Style Note This cotton racer back tank top from jockey is a must have summer essential that can be worn for all your training sessions or just when you are chilling out with friends. The soft fabric gives you a comfortable feel and the vibrant colours are simply fashionable. Pair this top with track pants and training shoes or shorts and casual shoes Product Details White racer back tank top that has a round neck, contemporary styling with wider armholes that provides maximum comfort and freedom of movement. This top is designed to be worn as training wear, lounge wear, inner wear or casual wear Material and Care 100 % combed cotton Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron
